hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE||'';if(!f)process.exit(0);if(f.includes('src/math/')||f.includes('src/core/')){try{const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(/from ['\"](react|React)/.test(c)||/require\(['\"]react/.test(c)){console.error('\n🚨 INVARIANT VIOLATION: React import in '+f+'\nmath/ and core/ must be pure JS only.');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}}" 2>&1 || true

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE||'';if(!f)process.exit(0);if(f.includes('src/')&&!f.includes('AIService.js')){try{const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(/fetch\(['\"]https:\/\/api\.anthropic\.com/.test(c)){console.error('\n🚨 INVARIANT VIOLATION: Direct Anthropic fetch in '+f+'\nAll API calls must go through AIService.js.');process.exit(1);}}catch(e){}}" 2>&1 || true

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE||'';if(!f)process.exit(0);if(f.includes('src/')){try{const c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const hooks=['useState','useEffect','useCallback','useMemo','useRef','useContext'];const lines=c.split('
');lines.forEach((line,i)=>{if(/^\s*(if|else|switch|\?|&&|\|\|)/.test(line)){const next=lines.slice(i,i+3).join(' ');if(hooks.some(h=>new RegExp('\b'+h+'\(').test(next))){console.warn('
⚠️  CRASH RISK: Possible hook in conditional at '+f+' line '+(i+1)+'
'+line.trim());}}});}catch(e){}}" 2>&1 || true
